title: EvidencePack
description: An Agent Governance Evidence Pack: a business-facing structured document summarizing AI-agent runtime governance evidence for security, risk, compliance, audit, and executive review.

pack_id.description: A unique identifier for this evidence pack.

pack_version.description: The version of the evidence pack format.

title.description: A human-readable title for this evidence pack.

generated_at.description: When this evidence pack was generated (ISO 8601).

review_status.description: The current review status of this evidence pack.

agent_overview.description: Overview of the agent being reviewed.

deployment_context.description: The deployment context for this agent.

tool_inventory.description: Inventory of tools available to this agent.

action_inventory.description: Inventory of actions this agent can propose.

authority_model.description: Summary of the authority model governing privileged actions.

policy_controls.description: Policy controls in place for this agent.

blocked_actions.description: Summary of actions that were blocked during the review period.

reliance_summary.description: Summary of sources this agent relied on.

replay_bundles.description: Inventory of replay bundles associated with this evidence pack.

validation_summary.description: Summary of validation results for replay bundles.

redaction_exports.description: Summary of redacted or signed exports generated from this evidence.

risk_register.description: Register of known risks associated with this agent.

review_records.description: Records of governance reviews conducted on this evidence pack.
